**CHECK constraints:**
- `coupons_condition_logic_check`: `CHECK ((condition_logic = ANY (ARRAY['and'::text, 'or'::text])))`
- `coupons_tag_match_mode_check`: `CHECK ((tag_match_mode = ANY (ARRAY['any'::text, 'all'::text])))`
- `coupons_target_customer_type_check`: `CHECK ((target_customer_type = ANY (ARRAY['enthusiast'::text, 'professional'::text])))`

**Indexes:**
```
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX coupons_code_key ON public.coupons USING btree (code)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX coupons_pkey ON public.coupons USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX idx_coupons_auto_apply ON public.coupons USING btree (auto_apply) WHERE (auto_apply = true)
CREATE INDEX idx_coupons_campaign ON public.coupons USING btree (campaign_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_coupons_code ON public.coupons USING btree (code)
CREATE INDEX idx_coupons_customer ON public.coupons USING btree (customer_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_coupons_customer_tags ON public.coupons USING gin (customer_tags) WHERE (customer_tags IS NOT NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_coupons_name ON public.coupons USING btree (name) WHERE (name IS NOT NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_coupons_requires_product_category_ids ON public.coupons USING gin (requires_product_category_ids) WHERE (requires_product_category_ids IS NOT NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_coupons_requires_product_ids ON public.coupons USING gin (requires_product_ids) WHERE (requires_product_ids IS NOT NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_coupons_requires_service_category_ids ON public.coupons USING gin (requires_service_category_ids) WHERE (requires_service_category_ids IS NOT NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_coupons_requires_service_ids ON public.coupons USING gin (requires_service_ids) WHERE (requires_service_ids IS NOT NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_coupons_status ON public.coupons USING btree (status)
```

| first_visit_date | DATE | — |  |
| last_visit_date | DATE | — |  |

| loyalty_points_balance | INTEGER | NOT NULL, DEFAULT 0 |  |

| updated_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | NOT NULL, DEFAULT now() |  |

| mobile_2 | TEXT | — |  |

| qbo_synced_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | — |  |

| email_prompt_dismissed_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | — |  |

**Indexes:**

CREATE UNIQUE INDEX customers_auth_user_id_key ON public.customers USING btree (auth_user_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX customers_pkey ON public.customers USING btree (id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX customers_square_customer_id_key ON public.customers USING btree (square_customer_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_customers_active ON public.customers USING btree (id) WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_customers_active_phone ON public.customers USING btree (phone) WHERE ((deleted_at IS NULL) AND (phone IS NOT NULL))
CREATE INDEX idx_customers_auth_user_id ON public.customers USING btree (auth_user_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_customers_email ON public.customers USING btree (email)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_customers_email_unique ON public.customers USING btree (lower(email)) WHERE ((deleted_at IS NULL) AND (email IS NOT NULL) AND (email <> ''::text))
CREATE INDEX idx_customers_last_visit ON public.customers USING btree (last_visit_date DESC)
CREATE INDEX idx_customers_lifetime_spend ON public.customers USING btree (lifetime_spend DESC)
CREATE INDEX idx_customers_loyalty ON public.customers USING btree (loyalty_points_balance DESC)
CREATE INDEX idx_customers_name ON public.customers USING btree (last_name, first_name)
CREATE INDEX idx_customers_phone ON public.customers USING btree (phone)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_customers_phone_unique ON public.customers USING btree (phone) WHERE ((deleted_at IS NULL) AND (phone IS NOT NULL) AND (phone <> ''::text))
CREATE INDEX idx_customers_qbo_id ON public.customers USING btree (qbo_id) WHERE (qbo_id IS NOT NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_customers_square_id ON public.customers USING btree (square_customer_id)
```

```

| category_id | UUID | FK → product_categories(id) ON DELETE SET NULL |  |
| vendor_id | UUID | FK → vendors(id) ON DELETE SET NULL |  |
| cost_price | NUMERIC(10,2) | NOT NULL, DEFAULT 0 |  |

| quantity_on_hand | INTEGER | NOT NULL, DEFAULT 0 |  |
| reorder_threshold | INTEGER | — |  |
| is_taxable | BOOLEAN | NOT NULL, DEFAULT true |  |
| is_loyalty_eligible | BOOLEAN | NOT NULL, DEFAULT true |  |
| image_url | TEXT | — |  |
| barcode | TEXT | — |  |
| is_active | BOOLEAN | NOT NULL, DEFAULT true |  |
| created_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | NOT NULL, DEFAULT now() |  |
| updated_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | NOT NULL, DEFAULT now() |  |
| slug | TEXT | UNIQUE, NOT NULL |  |
| qbo_id | TEXT | — |  |
| min_order_qty | INTEGER | — |  |
| show_on_website | BOOLEAN | NOT NULL, DEFAULT true |  |
| is_featured | BOOLEAN | NOT NULL, DEFAULT false |  |
| website_sort_order | INTEGER | NOT NULL, DEFAULT 0 |  |
| image_alt | TEXT | — |  |
| weight | NUMERIC(8,2) | — |  |
| length | NUMERIC(8,2) | — |  |
| width | NUMERIC(8,2) | — |  |
| height | NUMERIC(8,2) | — |  |
| weight_unit | TEXT | DEFAULT 'lb'::text |  |
| dimension_unit | TEXT | DEFAULT 'in'::text |  |
| sale_price | NUMERIC(10,2) | DEFAULT NULL::numeric |  |
| sale_starts_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | — |  |
| sale_ends_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | — |  |
| specs | JSONB | — |  |
| product_group_id | UUID | — |  |
| variant_label | TEXT | — |  |
| vendor_sku | TEXT | — |  |
| vendor_product_name | TEXT | — |  |

**CHECK constraints:**
- `chk_product_sale_price`: `CHECK (((sale_price IS NULL) OR (sale_price < retail_price)))`

**Indexes:**
```
CREATE INDEX idx_products_active ON public.products USING btree (is_active)
CREATE INDEX idx_products_barcode ON public.products USING btree (barcode) WHERE (barcode IS NOT NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_products_category ON public.products USING btree (category_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_products_group_id ON public.products USING btree (product_group_id) WHERE (product_group_id IS NOT NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_products_low_stock ON public.products USING btree (quantity_on_hand, reorder_threshold) WHERE (is_active = true)
CREATE INDEX idx_products_name ON public.products USING btree (name)
CREATE INDEX idx_products_search ON public.products USING gin (to_tsvector('english'::regconfig, ((((COALESCE(name, ''::text) || ' '::text) || COALESCE(description, ''::text)) || ' '::text) || COALESCE(sku, ''::text))))
CREATE INDEX idx_products_sku ON public.products USING btree (sku)
CREATE INDEX idx_products_vendor ON public.products USING btree (vendor_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_products_website ON public.products USING btree (show_on_website, is_featured, website_sort_order) WHERE (show_on_website = true)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX products_pkey ON public.products USING btree (id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX products_sku_key ON public.products USING btree (sku)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX products_slug_key ON public.products USING btree (slug)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX products_square_item_id_key ON public.products USING btree (square_item_id)
```

| id | UUID | PK, NOT NULL, DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() |  |
| quote_number | TEXT | UNIQUE, NOT NULL |  |
| customer_id | UUID | FK → customers(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT |  |
| vehicle_id | UUID | FK → vehicles(id) ON DELETE SET NULL |  |
| status | quote_status (enum) | NOT NULL, DEFAULT 'draft'::quote_status | enum values: draft, sent, viewed, accepted, expired, converted |
| subtotal | NUMERIC(10,2) | NOT NULL, DEFAULT 0 |  |
| tax_amount | NUMERIC(10,2) | NOT NULL, DEFAULT 0 |  |
| total_amount | NUMERIC(10,2) | NOT NULL, DEFAULT 0 |  |
| notes | TEXT | — |  |
| valid_until | TIMESTAMPTZ | — |  |
| sent_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | — |  |
| viewed_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | — |  |
| accepted_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | — |  |
| converted_appointment_id | UUID | FK → appointments(id) ON DELETE SET NULL |  |
| created_by | UUID | FK → employees(id) ON DELETE SET NULL |  |
| created_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | NOT NULL, DEFAULT now() |  |
| updated_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | NOT NULL, DEFAULT now() |  |
| access_token | TEXT | — |  |
| deleted_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | — |  |
| follow_up_status | TEXT | DEFAULT 'not_contacted'::text |  |
| last_activity_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | — |  |
| coupon_code | TEXT | — |  |
| is_mobile | BOOLEAN | NOT NULL, DEFAULT false |  |
| mobile_zone_id | UUID | FK → mobile_zones(id) ON DELETE SET NULL |  |
| mobile_address | TEXT | — |  |
| mobile_surcharge | NUMERIC(10,2) | DEFAULT 0 |  |
| mobile_zone_name_snapshot | TEXT | — |  |

**CHECK constraints:**
- `quotes_mobile_consistency`: `CHECK ((((is_mobile = false) AND (mobile_surcharge = (0)::numeric)) OR ((is_mobile = true) AND (mobile_surcharge > (0)::numeric))))`

**Indexes:**
```
CREATE INDEX idx_quotes_access_token ON public.quotes USING btree (access_token)
CREATE INDEX idx_quotes_customer ON public.quotes USING btree (customer_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_quotes_status ON public.quotes USING btree (status)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX quotes_pkey ON public.quotes USING btree (id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX quotes_quote_number_key ON public.quotes USING btree (quote_number)
```

| Column | Type | Constraints | Notes |

| description | TEXT | — |  |
| color_overrides | JSONB | DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb |  |

| particle_effect | TEXT | — |  |
| particle_intensity | INTEGER | DEFAULT 50 |  |
| particle_color | TEXT | — |  |
| ticker_message | TEXT | — |  |
| ticker_bg_color | TEXT | — |  |
| ticker_text_color | TEXT | — |  |
| themed_ad_creative_id | UUID | FK → ad_creatives(id) ON DELETE SET NULL |  |

| vehicle_compatibility | JSONB | NOT NULL, DEFAULT '["standard"]'::jsonb |  |
| special_requirements | TEXT | — |  |
| is_active | BOOLEAN | NOT NULL, DEFAULT true |  |
| display_order | INTEGER | NOT NULL, DEFAULT 0 |  |
| created_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | NOT NULL, DEFAULT now() |  |
| updated_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | NOT NULL, DEFAULT now() |  |
| slug | TEXT | UNIQUE, NOT NULL |  |
| image_url | TEXT | — |  |
| qbo_id | TEXT | — |  |
| show_on_website | BOOLEAN | NOT NULL, DEFAULT true |  |

| image_alt | TEXT | — |  |

```
CREATE INDEX idx_services_active ON public.services USING btree (is_active)
CREATE INDEX idx_services_category ON public.services USING btree (category_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_services_classification ON public.services USING btree (classification)
CREATE INDEX idx_services_pricing_model ON public.services USING btree (pricing_model)
CREATE INDEX idx_services_search ON public.services USING gin (to_tsvector('english'::regconfig, ((COALESCE(name, ''::text) || ' '::text) || COALESCE(description, ''::text))))
CREATE INDEX idx_services_website ON public.services USING btree (show_on_website, is_featured, display_order) WHERE (show_on_website = true)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX services_pkey ON public.services USING btree (id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX services_slug_key ON public.services USING btree (slug)

| make | TEXT | — |  |
| model | TEXT | — |  |

| specialty_tier | TEXT | — |  |
| size_class_manual_override | BOOLEAN | NOT NULL, DEFAULT false |  |

- `vehicles_specialty_tier_check`: `CHECK (((specialty_tier IS NULL) OR (specialty_tier = ANY (ARRAY['standard_cruiser'::text, 'touring_bagger'::text, 'rv_up_to_24'::text, 'rv_25_35'::text, 'rv_36_plus'::text, 'boat_up_to_20'::text, 'boat_21_26'::text, 'boat_27_32'::text, 'aircraft_2_4'::text, 'aircraft_6_8'::text, 'aircraft_turboprop'::text]))))`

**Indexes:**
```
CREATE INDEX idx_vehicles_customer ON public.vehicles USING btree (customer_id)

CREATE INDEX idx_vehicles_vehicle_category ON public.vehicles USING btree (vehicle_category)

| source | TEXT | NOT NULL |  |
| retry_count | INTEGER | NOT NULL, DEFAULT 0 |  |
| first_attempted_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | NOT NULL, DEFAULT now() |  |
| last_attempted_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | — |  |
| skip_reason | TEXT | — |  |

**CHECK constraints:**
- `voice_call_log_source_check`: `CHECK ((source = ANY (ARRAY['tool'::text, 'poll'::text, 'webhook'::text])))`

**Indexes:**
```
CREATE INDEX idx_voice_call_log_awaiting_retry ON public.voice_call_log USING btree (first_attempted_at) WHERE (status = 'awaiting_data'::text)
CREATE INDEX idx_voice_call_log_processed_at ON public.voice_call_log USING btree (processed_at DESC)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX voice_call_log_elevenlabs_conversation_id_key ON public.voice_call_log USING btree (elevenlabs_conversation_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX voice_call_log_pkey ON public.voice_call_log USING btree (id)
```

| Column | Type | Constraints | Notes |

| id | UUID | PK, NOT NULL, DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() |  |
| customer_id | UUID | NOT NULL, FK → customers(id) |  |
| service_id | UUID | NOT NULL, FK → services(id) |  |
| preferred_date | DATE | — |  |
| preferred_time_start | TIME | — |  |
| preferred_time_end | TIME | — |  |
| status | TEXT | NOT NULL, DEFAULT 'waiting'::text |  |
| notified_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | — |  |
| notes | TEXT | — |  |
| created_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | NOT NULL, DEFAULT now() |  |

**CHECK constraints:**
- `waitlist_entries_status_check`: `CHECK ((status = ANY (ARRAY['waiting'::text, 'notified'::text, 'booked'::text, 'expired'::text, 'cancelled'::text])))`

**Indexes:**
```
CREATE INDEX idx_waitlist_entries_customer ON public.waitlist_entries USING btree (customer_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_waitlist_entries_date ON public.waitlist_entries USING btree (preferred_date)
CREATE INDEX idx_waitlist_entries_service ON public.waitlist_entries USING btree (service_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_waitlist_entries_status ON public.waitlist_entries USING btree (status)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX waitlist_entries_pkey ON public.waitlist_entries USING btree (id)
```


## website_navigation

| Column | Type | Constraints | Notes |
|--------|------|-------------|-------|
| id | UUID | PK, NOT NULL, DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() |  |
| placement | TEXT | NOT NULL |  |
| label | TEXT | NOT NULL |  |
| url | TEXT | NOT NULL, DEFAULT '#'::text |  |
| page_id | UUID | FK → website_pages(id) ON DELETE CASCADE |  |
| parent_id | UUID | FK → website_navigation(id) ON DELETE CASCADE |  |
| target | TEXT | NOT NULL, DEFAULT '_self'::text |  |
| icon | TEXT | — |  |
| is_active | BOOLEAN | NOT NULL, DEFAULT true |  |
| sort_order | INTEGER | NOT NULL, DEFAULT 0 |  |
| created_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | NOT NULL, DEFAULT now() |  |
| footer_column_id | UUID | FK → footer_columns(id) ON DELETE SET NULL |  |

**CHECK constraints:**
- `website_navigation_placement_check`: `CHECK ((placement = ANY (ARRAY['header'::text, 'footer_quick_links'::text, 'footer_services'::text])))`
- `website_navigation_target_check`: `CHECK ((target = ANY (ARRAY['_self'::text, '_blank'::text])))`

**Indexes:**
```
CREATE INDEX idx_website_navigation_footer_column ON public.website_navigation USING btree (footer_column_id) WHERE (footer_column_id IS NOT NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_website_navigation_parent ON public.website_navigation USING btree (parent_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_website_navigation_placement_sort ON public.website_navigation USING btree (placement, sort_order)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX unique_footer_link_per_column ON public.website_navigation USING btree (footer_column_id, label, url) WHERE (footer_column_id IS NOT NULL)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX website_navigation_pkey ON public.website_navigation USING btree (id)
```


## website_pages

| Column | Type | Constraints | Notes |
|--------|------|-------------|-------|
| id | UUID | PK, NOT NULL, DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() |  |
| title | TEXT | NOT NULL |  |
| slug | TEXT | UNIQUE, NOT NULL |  |
| page_template | TEXT | NOT NULL, DEFAULT 'content'::text |  |
| parent_id | UUID | FK → website_pages(id) ON DELETE SET NULL |  |
| content | TEXT | DEFAULT ''::text |  |
| is_published | BOOLEAN | NOT NULL, DEFAULT false |  |
| show_in_nav | BOOLEAN | NOT NULL, DEFAULT false |  |
| sort_order | INTEGER | NOT NULL, DEFAULT 0 |  |
| meta_title | TEXT | — |  |
| meta_description | TEXT | — |  |
| og_image_url | TEXT | — |  |
| created_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | NOT NULL, DEFAULT now() |  |
| updated_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | NOT NULL, DEFAULT now() |  |
| preview_token | TEXT | — |  |
| preview_token_expires_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | — |  |

**CHECK constraints:**
- `website_pages_page_template_check`: `CHECK ((page_template = ANY (ARRAY['content'::text, 'landing'::text, 'blank'::text])))`

**Indexes:**
```
CREATE INDEX idx_website_pages_parent ON public.website_pages USING btree (parent_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_website_pages_published ON public.website_pages USING btree (is_published, sort_order)
CREATE INDEX idx_website_pages_slug ON public.website_pages USING btree (slug)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX website_pages_pkey ON public.website_pages USING btree (id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX website_pages_slug_key ON public.website_pages USING btree (slug)
```

## Enums

- `appointment_channel`: `online`, `phone`, `walk_in`, `portal`
- `appointment_status`: `pending`, `confirmed`, `in_progress`, `completed`, `cancelled`, `no_show`
- `campaign_channel`: `sms`, `email`, `both`
- `campaign_status`: `draft`, `scheduled`, `sending`, `sent`, `paused`, `cancelled`
- `consent_action`: `opt_in`, `opt_out`
- `consent_channel`: `sms`, `email`
- `consent_source`: `pos`, `online`, `portal`, `import`, `manual`
- `coupon_status`: `draft`, `active`, `redeemed`, `expired`, `disabled`
- `employee_status`: `active`, `inactive`, `terminated`
- `lifecycle_action`: `sms`, `email`, `both`
- `loyalty_action`: `earned`, `redeemed`, `adjusted`, `expired`, `welcome_bonus`
- `payment_method`: `cash`, `card`, `split`, `check`, `digital`
- `payment_status`: `pending`, `partial`, `paid`, `refunded`, `partial_refund`
- `po_status`: `draft`, `ordered`, `received`, `cancelled`
- `prerequisite_enforcement`: `required_same_ticket`, `required_history`, `recommended`
- `pricing_model`: `vehicle_size`, `scope`, `per_unit`, `specialty`, `flat`, `custom`
- `quote_status`: `draft`, `sent`, `viewed`, `accepted`, `expired`, `converted`
- `refund_status`: `pending`, `processed`, `failed`
- `service_classification`: `primary`, `addon_only`, `both`
- `transaction_item_type`: `product`, `service`, `package`, `custom`, `mobile_fee`
- `transaction_status`: `open`, `completed`, `voided`, `refunded`, `partial_refund`
- `user_role`: `super_admin`, `admin`, `cashier`, `detailer`, `marketing`
- `vehicle_size_class`: `sedan`, `truck_suv_2row`, `suv_3row_van`, `exotic`, `classic`
- `vehicle_type`: `standard`, `motorcycle`, `rv`, `boat`, `aircraft`
